description_long: This structure is a small, open-sided pagoda with a single, broad, hipped roof made of dark, textured tiles. The roof is supported by four slender columns at each corner, leaving the interior space open and accessible from all sides. The base consists of a raised platform with steps leading up to the main floor, and the platform appears to be constructed from stone or concrete. At the apex of the roof, there is a small ornamental finial, adding a decorative touch to the otherwise simple design. The overall color palette is dominated by dark grays and blacks, giving the structure a subdued, elegant appearance. The pagoda is compact and likely intended for use as a shelter or decorative feature in a park or urban garden.
description: A compact, open-sided pagoda with a dark, hipped roof, stone platform, and ornamental finial, suitable for parks or urban gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main steps leading up to the raised platform and a plaque or sign on the base.
description_view_1: Rear view with a clear view of the open interior and the back edge of the platform, no steps visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the broad, hipped roof and the steps on the left side of the platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single set of steps leading up to the platform, and the ornamental finial visible at the roof's peak.
